CONTENT.Early life: Touré was born in Gonesse, in the northern suburbs of Paris. He holds Ivorian nationality from birth and acquired French nationality on 11 December 2008, through the collective effect of his mother's naturalization.
CONTENT.Club career: On 11 July 2020, Touré signed his first professional contract with Le Havre. He made his professional debut in a 1–0 Ligue 2 win over Amiens on 29 August.On 30 June 2022, Touré signed for Ligue 1 side Marseille on a five-year contract. On 3 January 2023, Touré joined AJ Auxerre on loan until the end of the season.
CONTENT.External links: S. Touré at SoccerwaySouleymane Touré at the French Football Federation (in French)
CONTENT.International career: Touré is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Souleymane Isaak Touré (born 28 March 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defender for  Ligue 2 club Lorient.
